name: Super Sea Shell Salad
directions: Cook macaroni according to package directions; drain. Cool by rinsing with cold water; drain well.
Combine cooked macaroni, cauliflower, peas, celery, radishes, and eggs in a large bowl.
Combine mayonnaise, blue cheese dressing, green onion, and salt in a small bowl; blend well.
Pour dressing over macaroni mixture; toss lightly till ingredients are evenly coated.
Chill at least 2 hours.

similar.name: Shrimp Pasta Salad With Dry Mix

name: Mexican Stuffed Pasta Shells
directions: Fill a large pot about half full of water. Add 1/2 tsp of salt if desired. Cover and heat over high heat until the water is boiling rapidly. Add pasta shells. Heat to boiling again. Boil uncovered 11 to 13 min, stirring frequently, until tender. While the water is heating and the pasta shells are cooking, continue.
Peel and chop onion. Cook groud beef and onion in a skillet over medium heat until beef is brown, drain any excess fat.
Stir the chili powder, cream cheese, and 1/4 cup of the taco sauce into the beef in skillet. Heat over medium low heat 2-3 min, stirring occasionally, until cheese is melted. Remove from heat.
Heat oven to 350'. Spray casserole or baking dish with cooking spray.
Drain the pasta shells in a strainer. Fill the shells with beef mixture. About 2 tablespoons. Place filled shells in pan. Pour rest of 1/2 cup taco sauce over the shells.

Cover with aluminium foil and bake 20 minute Remove the pan from oven. Sprinkle cheese (and corn chips if desired) over shells. Bake uncovered about 10 min longer or until cheese is melted. Peel and slice the green onions. Garnish pasta shells with sour cream and green onions, if desired,.

similar.name: Shrimp Pasta Salad With Dry Mix

name: Marjorie's Macaroni Salad
directions: Boil pasta, drain and rinse with cold water.
Sprinkle cold pasta with seasoning.
Stir in green onions, eggs, cheese, and bacon, adding tomatoes last.
Let chill in the refrigerator and serve.

similar.name: Shrimp Pasta Salad With Dry Mix

name: Tuna-Stuffed Shells With Tomato-Basil Vinaigrette
ingredients: solid white tuna packed in water
directions: Cook pasta shells as directed on package.
While pasta is cooking, prepare Tomato-Basil Vinaigrette.

Mix mayonnaise, basil and salt in medium bowl. Stir in tuna, carrot, zucchini and onion until evenly mixed. Drain pasta. Rincse with cold water; drawin. Fill each pasta shell with 1 rounded tablespoon tuna mixture.
Line serving platter with lettuce leaves. Arrange shells on lettuce. Serve with tomato basil vinaigrette.

similar.name: Shrimp Pasta Salad With Dry Mix

name: Shrimp Pasta Salad With Dry Mix
directions: In 8 cups boiling water, add 1 tablespoon oil and 1 teaspoon salt, then add macaroni.
Cook until tender.
Rinse in cold water and drain.
When well drained, add mayonnaise, sour cream, shrimp and spices.
Refrigerate several hours. Just before serving, add tomatoes, avocados and celery. Mix well.
Preparation time is a guess. Cooking time is refrigeration time.
ENJOY!

name: Black-Eyed Peas and Pasta
directions: Bring a large pot of water to a boil over high heat.  Add salt, if using, and stir in the pasta shells.  Reduce the heat to medium-high and cook the shells, uncovered, until al dente, 8 minutes.
Meanwhile, place the tomatoes, black-eyed peas, olive oil, garlic, and cayenne in a large mixing bowl and stir to combine.
Drain the pasta shells well in a colander.  Transfer the shells to the mixing bowl and stir to combine well.  Serve topped with the feta cheese, bacon, and parsley.

similar.name: Shrimp Pasta Salad With Dry Mix
